examples: Don't leave a stone unturned. It's always something, to know you've done the most you could.
We'll leave no stone unturned to accomplish the great task.
They left no stone unturned in their search for the child's mother.
"The ICC has to take a firm lead and leave no stone unturned, " he said.
Republicans are trying to leave no stone unturned in their efforts to tie Democrats to scandal.
